mapper.select: SELECT * FROM red_confirmation ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM red_confirmation WHERE invoice_id = #{invoiceId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM red_confirmation WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM red_confirmation WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO red_confirmation (confirmation_no, invoice_id, customer_id, cancel_type, cancel_reason, cancel_amount, status, initiator_id, initiator_name, confirmer_id, confirmer_name, initiate_time, confirm_time, expire_time, remark) VALUES (#{confirmationNo}, #{invoiceId}, #{customerId}, #{cancelType}, #{cancelReason}, #{cancelAmount}, #{status}, #{initiatorId}, #{initiatorName}, #{confirmerId}, #{confirmerName}, #{initiateTime}, #{confirmTime}, #{expireTime}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE red_confirmation SET confirmation_no = #{confirmationNo}, invoice_id = #{invoiceId}, customer_id = #{customerId}, cancel_type = #{cancelType}, cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, cancel_amount = #{cancelAmount}, status = #{status}, initiator_id = #{initiatorId}, initiator_name = #{initiatorName}, confirmer_id = #{confirmerId}, confirmer_name = #{confirmerName}, initiate_time = #{initiateTime}, confirm_time = #{confirmTime}, expire_time = #{expireTime}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
